commit.message:
Merge pull request #55 from tensorflow/update_rule

Improve SGD with L1 regularization: Set weight to 0 once it crosses 0
Improve SGD with L1 regularization: Set weight to 0 once it crosses 0
Update deps and clean lint errors

Merge pull request #40 from endash/patch-1

Fix weight line hover target style

Merge pull request #21 from mldangelo/master

removes deprecation warning

Merge pull request #46 from urish/windows-support

fix: npm scripts not working on Windows

Merge pull request #53 from primetang/master

Fix a failed link about contribution guidelines.

Merge pull request #51 from Hinaser/fix-terminology

Fixed terminology. Iterations -> Epoch
fix: npm scripts not working on Windows
Track 'simulation start' and if parameters have changed
extracting analytics to a separate file
moving typescript files to src/ dir
remove dist version from the repo
do not fetch tutorial when hideText is true
emit pageview only upon user interaction
Hide header when hideText is true

Fix weight line hover target style

Weight line hover targets are no longer "drawn" as a closed & filled path
Add hideText param in the URL that hides the text below the viz.
Adding an initialize network with zeros url param.

Merge pull request #15 from GortMcTabs/ecf/contribute-add-md

Rename contributing file to include md extension

Merge pull request #13 from danbri/patch-1

Fixed typo "more a more" -> "a more"
Make derivative of ReLU consistent with TensorFlow (der should be 0 when x is 0).
showing the bias values for each node
Change input to features, since the data is the input
Rename contributing file to include md extension

Merge pull request #6 from mahnerak/master

Don't reset when learningRate is changed
Don't reset when learningRate is changed
clarify that we are not using TensorFlow
Putting doctype first, just to be safe
Added ability to hide controls. Useful for using the playground in a classroom.
Adding twitter and facebook mumbo jumbo.
Replace the header text with the <title> text when in tutorial mode.
add more (smaller) learning rates. Requested by ML users
Visual update: make play/pause/step buttons take less space

Update README.md

Remove tensorflow from README
fix small bug when resetting the appending line chart
adding regression as a type of problem
limit the max-width of the dropdown controls
added support for tutorials to overwrite title of page
make play button hidable, and move line chart to the right
Added a line chart of accurracy train vs test
add ability to hide input features

- Added hiding of controls
- Separate data regeneration from weights reinitialization
transition faster so not out of sync
using mdl buttons for a11y. now keyboard accessible
improve recall for placing weight and neuron callouts
draw the network correctly since there are css-responsive changes and redraw on css responsive changes (e.g. when user resizes the window)
Moving buttons back to the left
New colors and MDL color overrides
solve the weight callout position for real this time
correct the callout coordinates (a little bit)
align checkboxes in the same row
added some hover effects on buttons
add white background color to dataset thumbnails
Link label values with input range controls
Adjust height of main part dynamically, as the network grows in height. Plus, some tiny changes in text.
Migrating the TODO.md out of the repo into a google doc
make public/lib dir if it doesn't exist
remove d3.min.js from repo. We downloading it using npm
Fix discretize output to reflect the +1/-1 labels
Added README.md, LICENSE and license headers to all source files
fix accuracy to reflect that -1 is negativeand +1 is positive example. Also change default network structure to 2x2x3x1
Add heuristics for placing of callouts.
Fix broken <path> element (probably due to merge conflicts)
